Comfortable Accommodation: Lemon Tree Studio 991 in Langebaan offers a one-bedroom apartment with a sun terrace, garden, and tennis court. Guests enjoy free WiFi, private check-in and check-out services, and full-day security.
Modern Amenities: The apartment features a kitchenette, streaming services, and a work desk. Additional amenities include a barbecue area, outdoor seating, and bicycle parking. Free on-site private parking is available.
Convenient Location: Located 133 km from Cape Town International Airport, the property is 1.8 km from Langebaan Golf Course. Nearby attractions include Columbine Nature Reserve (48 km) and West Coast Fossil Park (18 km). Water sports are popular in the surroundings.

Albatross Guesthouse is conveniently located in the centre of Langebaan and only a 500-metre walk away from the beach. It offers comfortable accommodation.
The well-appointed rooms at Albatross Guesthouse are each equipped with a ceiling fan, a microwave, a mini fridge and a TV with selected satellite channels. A hairdryer, electric blankets and tea-and-coffee-making facilities are provided.  All rooms have an en-suite shower bathroom whereas the room in the house has a full bathroom. Rooms are serviced daily, turned down at night, and linen is changed every other day.
Guests can enjoy breakfast in the main house or in the garden.
The West Coast National Park entrance can be reached within 6 km.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.1 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Limpokwena Nature Reserve in Alldays offers a lodge with a sun terrace, garden, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available in public areas.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy private check-in and check-out, a lounge, outdoor fireplace, and barbecue facilities. The property features family rooms, a shared kitchen, and free on-site parking.
Scenic Views: The lodge provides garden, pool, and mountain views, alongside river and landmark vistas. Outdoor dining areas and picnic spots enhance the relaxing atmosphere.
Highly Rated: Guests appreciate the excellent service, comfortable accommodations, and scenic surroundings, making it a preferred choice for a memorable stay.
